fields_or_columns_seen: Comparison of pilot and full-scale trial characteristics
found_files.evidence_text: Supplement 1 reportedly contains eTables and eFigures such as a search strategy, study-selection flowchart, complete list of diseases, and tables comparing pilot and full-scale trial characteristics. The external agent reported that it does not include row-level effect or sample-size data for pilot-full-scale treatment-effect pairs.
found_files.why_relevant: The supplementary file is attached to the JAMA article, but the external agent reported summary/supporting tables only, not the desired row-level treatment-effect dataset.

fields_or_columns_seen: Data types: Data (not involving human participants)
How to access data: contact first author
found_files.evidence_text: The external agent reported that the Data Sharing Statement says data are available by contacting the first author at xying5@jh.edu and are available upon reasonable request.
found_files.why_relevant: This is the key evidence that the row-level data probably exist but are not posted as a public downloadable table.

nonworking_or_blocked_routes.notes: The external agent reported Cloudflare/403 blocking for the BMJ Evidence-Based Medicine article route.
The external agent reported Cloudflare/403 blocking for the BMJ supplementary route.
The external agent reported bot-protection blocking for the JHU dissertation route.
The external agent reported ResearchGate Cloudflare blocking.
The external agent reported a Site Unavailable response for the Journal of Clinical Epidemiology route.

dn_assessment.notes: The public article/supporting-material routes checked do not provide a row-level treatment-effect and sample-size file. The data-sharing statement points to author request.

paperclip_lookup.title: Pilot Trial Characteristics, Postpilot Design Modifications, and Feasibility of Full-Scale Trials
paperclip_lookup.paperclip_content_lines_note: Article text confirms Supplement 1 and Supplement 2 labels; line text reports 249 pairs and feasibility parameter availability, but not row-level treatment-effect D/N values.

local_download_attempts.local_result: download returned Google reCAPTCHA HTML, not a PDF
download returned Google reCAPTCHA HTML, not a PDF

recommended_next_action: Contact the first author at xying5@jh.edu to request the row-level pilot/full-scale treatment-effect dataset. Ask specifically for pilot/full-scale pair identifiers, effect estimates or conversion inputs, pilot N, full-scale N, outcome labels, and citations/DOIs for both trials.
